breaking.title: Israel-Iran war LIVE: Peace talks stall after Hezbollah rejects truce
breaking.summary: Hezbollah has rejected the Israel-Lebanon talks, while a previous ceasefire announced on April 17 has been breached daily, with Israeli troops deployed deep inside Lebanese territory and the Iran-backed militants continuing to attack Israel

breaking.title: US House Approves Billions In Aid To Ukraine, Impose Sanctions On Russia
breaking.summary: The 226-195 vote is a sign of impatience with President Donald Trump's approach to the war

breaking.title: Delhi hotel fire: Blaze survivors grapple with physical, emotional scars
breaking.summary: “Will never stay at a hotel again,” says one of the injured individuals as they recall the morning of their escape from the deadly fire

breaking.title: Bidhannagar Corporation Mayor resigns a day after Kolkata Corporation Mayor quit
breaking.summary: KMC is yet to accept Firhad Hakim’s resignation even though party supremo Mamata Banerjee gave her nod to the move

breaking.title: Indian killed in strike at Kuwait International Airport identified as Ujjain resident; was coming home for family wedding
breaking.summary: A resident of Ujjain town, Manzoor Ahmed, 55, had been working as a tailor in Kuwait for about 30 years, and was about to travel to his hometown on Wednesday morning for a family wedding

breaking.title: RBI Monetary Policy Committee LIVE: Repo rate unchanged at 5.25%
breaking.summary: The six-member MPC started its three-day deliberations on Wednesday (June 3, 2026)

breaking.title: Did this L&T-backed AI stock actually crash 90% in one day? Here's all you need to know
breaking.summary: E2E Networks appeared to plunge nearly 90% in a day after its 1:10 stock split took effect, but the move was purely a price adjustment. The AI-focused cloud computing company actually hit the 5% upper circuit post-split. Backed by L&T, the stock has surged over 127% in 2026 so far.

breaking.title: Silver prices tank Rs 5,700/kg, gold down Rs 1,300/10 gm as Iran war uncertainty stokes inflation worries. Time to sell?
breaking.summary: Gold and silver prices saw a sharp decline on the Multi Commodity Exchange on Friday. Renewed Middle East tensions and inflation worries weighed on market sentiment. MCX silver futures for July 2026 delivery dropped significantly, as did gold futures for August 2026 delivery.
